title: Project Miner PM Intake Approval Packet Preview Export
objective: Add a browser-only approval packet preview JSON export to /pm-review/import-intake so a later admitted approval-persistence lane can receive structured candidate, contract, storage, local review, and boundary context without adding approval persistence, import mutation, backend endpoints, schema, hosted deployment, or live business-state writes.
active_role: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / Local Implementation Executor
implementation_summary: Added a browser-only Export Approval Preview JSON action to the Project Miner import-intake workbench.
The preview JSON is generated entirely from the already-loaded import candidate, admission plan, approval contract, approval storage plan, local review checklist, and local approval decision draft.

The JSON includes preview kind/version, local timestamp, mutation and persistence authority, candidate identity, approval contract, storage plan, local review evidence, decision draft, and future packet boundary.
The export uses a local browser download and does not call a backend route, mutation route, clipboard API, hosted service, Supabase, Render, or Vercel.

The focused import-intake Playwright smoke now validates the downloaded preview filename and parsed JSON shape while preserving exact read counts, zero mutation calls, no unmocked API calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import buttons.
A read-only sidecar independently confirmed this as the safest local-only approval packet preview scope and recommended the JSON fields and smoke assertions.
validation_steps: corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed and route output included /pm-review/import-intake.

Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after verifying the approval preview JSON filename, parsed JSON contract, decision draft, checklist evidence, future packet boundary, exact four reads, zero mutation calls, no unmocked API calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import buttons.
Focused PM intake Playwright suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
hosted_status: local_current_only; hosted promotion remains assigned to PM Lane 041A/041B
